name: opencode-subagent
description: Delegate approved repository tasks to a controlled local OpenCode worker.

interface.shortDescription: Controlled local delegation from Codex to OpenCode.
interface.longDescription: Initialize any Jujutsu-backed repository for contract-bound OpenCode delegation with isolated workspaces, budgets, verification, one bounded approval, and Codex-owned local review and integration.
defaultPrompt: Initialize this project for safe OpenCode delegation.
Draft a bounded OpenCode task contract for this change.
Show the status of my delegated OpenCode task.
